name: SMB Onboarding Agent
description: Automates the full SMB merchant onboarding lifecycle — from application submission to first live transaction — cutting average onboarding time from days to hours.
capabilities: KYB (Know Your Business) verification against government and commercial databases
Risk scoring across 12 signals including credit, fraud history, and industry risk
Payment terminal provisioning and configuration
Document collection, validation, and secure storage
Banking account verification via micro-deposit

name: Churn Prevention Agent
description: Continuously monitors print customer order patterns to detect early churn signals and automatically trigger retention campaigns before customers leave.
capabilities: Order pattern monitoring and trend analysis
Churn risk scoring based on purchase frequency and recency
Automated retention email campaign execution
Sales team escalation for high-value at-risk accounts
Win-back sequences for recently churned customers

name: Invoice Reconciliation Agent
description: Eliminates manual invoice-to-payment matching across multiple ERP systems, auto-posting matched transactions to the GL and flagging exceptions for human review.
capabilities: Invoice-to-payment matching across multiple ERP systems
Exception flagging with suggested resolution for unmatched items
General Ledger (GL) journal entry write-back
Native integration with SAP, Oracle, and NetSuite
Real-time reconciliation with audit trail

name: Data Enrichment Agent
description: Continuously enriches SMB customer profiles with firmographic, revenue, and payment behavior signals to improve segmentation, propensity scoring, and upsell targeting.
capabilities: SMB revenue and firmographic data enrichment from external sources
Payment behavior scoring and trend analysis
Continuous customer profile refresh and de-duplication
Propensity model feature preparation and scoring
Segmentation updates pushed to downstream CRM and marketing systems

name: Fraud Detection Agent
description: Provides sub-second real-time fraud detection across the merchant transaction stream, automatically holding suspicious accounts and generating compliance reports.
capabilities: Sub-second transaction anomaly detection with 99.8% accuracy
Automated account hold for high-confidence fraud signals
Compliance alerts and regulatory notification workflows
Suspicious Activity Report (SAR) generation for BSA/AML compliance
Merchant risk profile updates based on transaction history
solves: Auto account hold on confirmed fraud

name: Upsell Intelligence Agent
description: Identifies print customers most likely to expand into payments products by scoring propensity, prioritizing leads, and routing them to the right sales team with context-rich proposals.
capabilities: Print-to-payments migration propensity scoring
Lead prioritization and queue management for sales teams
Automated proposal generation based on customer profile
Intelligent sales team routing by territory and product expertise

name: Terminal Provisioning Agent
description: Automates POS terminal ordering, configuration, and shipping for newly approved merchants — reducing provisioning time from days to hours.
capabilities: Terminal inventory lookup and reservation
Automated shipping label creation and carrier selection
Remote terminal configuration and firmware push
Merchant portal activation notification
Delivery tracking and confirmation

name: Dispute Resolution Agent
description: Manages chargeback and dispute workflows by automatically collecting transaction evidence and routing cases for adjudication.
capabilities: Chargeback notification ingestion and classification
Automated evidence collection from transaction records
Dispute package assembly and submission
Win/loss outcome tracking and reporting
Merchant notification at each stage

name: Merchant KYC/AML Agent
description: Provides continuous KYC/AML screening for merchant accounts against OFAC, global sanctions lists, and adverse media.
capabilities: Real-time OFAC and global sanctions screening
Adverse media and PEP (Politically Exposed Person) checks
Beneficial ownership verification
Periodic re-screening on schedule
Automated alert generation for compliance officers

name: Print Order Fulfillment Agent
description: Orchestrates end-to-end print order fulfilment from order receipt through production queue to dispatch confirmation.
capabilities: Order intake and inventory availability check
Print job queue management and prioritisation
Shipping label generation and carrier selection
Customer dispatch notification
Exception handling for out-of-stock or production delays

name: Reorder Reminder Agent
description: Predicts reorder windows based on historical order frequency and sends personalised reorder nudges to print customers at optimal timing.
capabilities: Order history analysis and reorder window prediction
Personalised email and SMS reorder nudges
Discount offer injection for at-risk reorders
Click-through tracking and conversion attribution
CRM update on customer engagement

name: ACH Payment Processor
description: Processes ACH credit and debit transactions end-to-end with bank account verification, NACHA formatting, and full audit trail.
capabilities: ACH credit and debit origination and submission
Bank account micro-deposit verification
NACHA file formatting and batch management
Return and NOC (Notice of Change) handling
Real-time payment status tracking

name: Wire Transfer Verifier
description: Verifies wire transfer beneficiary details against sanctions lists before authorisation, then posts confirmed transfers to GL.
capabilities: Beneficiary bank account and routing number validation
SWIFT BIC verification for international transfers
Real-time sanctions and OFAC screening of beneficiaries
GL posting with wire reference and audit trail
Compliance hold and alert for flagged beneficiaries

name: Vendor Onboarding Agent
description: Streamlines vendor onboarding by automating KYB checks, bank account verification, ERP supplier setup, and payment term configuration.
capabilities: Vendor KYB and tax ID validation
Bank account ACH pre-note verification
ERP supplier master record creation
Payment terms and credit limit configuration
Vendor portal invitation and onboarding email

name: SMB Credit Scoring Agent
description: Generates real-time SMB credit scores by combining bureau data, payment history, and proprietary underwriting risk models.
capabilities: Multi-bureau credit data aggregation
Proprietary payment behaviour scoring
Industry and geography risk adjustment
Score refresh on trigger events
Score explanation generation for underwriters

name: Lead Scoring Agent
description: Scores inbound and outbound leads using intent signals, firmographic data, and behavioural patterns to prioritise sales outreach.
capabilities: Intent signal aggregation from web and third-party sources
Firmographic fit scoring against ICP
Behavioural engagement scoring from CRM activity
Lead tier assignment and routing to sales queues
Score decay and refresh on inactivity

name: Market Segmentation Agent
description: Continuously re-segments the SMB customer base using ML clustering on enriched profiles to power targeted marketing and product decisions.
capabilities: K-means and hierarchical clustering on enriched SMB attributes
Segment label generation and description
CRM segment tag update and synchronisation
Segment drift monitoring and re-clustering trigger
Downstream marketing system sync

name: Data Quality Monitor
description: Continuously monitors data pipeline quality by checking schema conformance, completeness, and freshness — triggering repair jobs on failure.
capabilities: Schema drift detection and alerting
Null/completeness checks on critical fields
Data freshness SLA monitoring
Automated repair job triggering
Data quality scorecard generation

name: Compliance Audit Agent
description: Generates automated compliance audit reports across all running agents and workflows, flagging policy deviations for executive review.
capabilities: Automated audit report generation on schedule
Policy deviation detection across agent actions
Regulatory requirement mapping (PCI, SOX, BSA)
Exception escalation to compliance officers
Historical audit trail retrieval and export

name: API Gateway Monitor
description: Monitors API gateway health, enforces rate limits, and alerts on anomalous traffic patterns that may indicate abuse or outages.
capabilities: Real-time API health and latency monitoring
Rate limit enforcement and throttling
Anomalous traffic pattern detection
Downstream service dependency tracking
Incident alert dispatch and runbook triggering

name: Purchase Order Automation Agent
description: Automates PO creation, multi-level approval routing, and ERP sync for B2B procurement workflows — eliminating manual handoffs.
capabilities: PO creation from requisition inputs
Multi-level approval routing based on amount and category
ERP purchase order write-back
Budget availability check before routing
Vendor notification on PO issuance

name: Expense Report Processor
description: Extracts expense line items from receipt images via OCR, validates against expense policy, and routes for manager approval or auto-approves compliant reports.
capabilities: Receipt OCR and line-item extraction
Expense policy compliance validation
Auto-approval for fully compliant reports
Manager approval routing for exceptions
GL coding and ERP reimbursement posting
